	+ (66*x^49 + 462*x^48 + 2088*x^47 - 489406*x^46 + 1591090*x^45 - 5113434*x^44 + 5655917*x^43 - 5349377*x^42 - 10024762*x^41 + 16032456*x^40 - 20269777*x^39 + 4392355*x^38 + 20565744*x^37 - 48501552*x^36 + 156692201*x^35 - 657998609*x^34 + 955060745*x^33 - 2309254105*x^32 + 1319661644*x^31 - 2048687734*x^30 - 1315303703*x^29 + 1683328103*x^28 - 3132018356*x^27 + 3619793184*x^26 + 29086332*x^25 + 2623942408*x^24 + 2881176559*x^23 + 1843887375*x^22 + 1948511539*x^21 + 439204724*x^20 - 600610749*x^19 - 1719375120*x^18 - 2273977636*x^17 - 2227939633*x^16 - 1353789883*x^15 - 224848844*x^14 + 1131432645*x^13 + 1914489528*x^12 + 2291039402*x^11 + 2016356209*x^10 + 1518621188*x^9 + 924671145*x^8 + 479221457*x^7 + 197301402*x^6 + 65263407*x^5 + 14947504*x^4 + 2219789*x^3 - 66*x^2 - 11*x - 1)*y^11
	- x^3*(12*x^44 + 96*x^43 + 453*x^42 - 318096*x^41 + 900711*x^40 - 2638647*x^39 + 2318778*x^38 - 1834536*x^37 - 4543418*x^36 + 4932433*x^35 - 4959515*x^34 - 1781668*x^33 - 435790*x^32 - 32737174*x^31 + 44914477*x^30 - 347293124*x^29 + 392884054*x^28 - 1022075000*x^27 + 630510406*x^26 - 804803231*x^25 - 46977889*x^24 + 607258718*x^23 - 420268912*x^22 + 1243094250*x^21 + 265985025*x^20 + 805320459*x^19 + 517148057*x^18 + 236744684*x^17 + 20590463*x^16 - 259545755*x^15 - 393749864*x^14 - 407806811*x^13 - 266948189*x^12 - 43175531*x^11 + 231626917*x^10 + 412210292*x^9 + 520017209*x^8 + 474896747*x^7 + 380785642*x^6 + 241113598*x^5 + 134240995*x^4 + 57748410*x^3 + 20917350*x^2 + 5032170*x + 888030)*y^10
	+ x^3*(x^42 + 9*x^41 + 45*x^40 - 170379*x^39 + 405537*x^38 - 1080915*x^37 + 650694*x^36 - 464288*x^35 - 1698389*x^34 + 714461*x^33 - 1357023*x^32 - 2517315*x^31 - 5307891*x^30 - 19350926*x^29 + 10386084*x^28 - 145443754*x^27 + 150063717*x^26 - 355996514*x^25 + 266658049*x^24 - 229621266*x^23 + 116915580*x^22 + 184870252*x^21 + 18401532*x^20 + 295497256*x^19 + 78741626*x^18 + 133988736*x^17 + 37541766*x^16 - 9983662*x^15 - 45974882*x^14 - 55594137*x^13 - 38165369*x^12 - 1543895*x^11 + 43444371*x^10 + 78506145*x^9 + 100431704*x^8 + 95696852*x^7 + 80663675*x^6 + 53347323*x^5 + 31808395*x^4 + 14302500*x^3 + 5675190*x^2 + 1426230*x + 296010)*y^9
	+ x^3*(74613*x^37 - 140448*x^36 + 346731*x^35 - 85855*x^34 + 111727*x^33 + 534358*x^32 + 213758*x^31 + 655064*x^30 + 1550676*x^29 + 3438254*x^28 + 8462597*x^27 - 2943626*x^26 + 47802653*x^25 - 52606567*x^24 + 97626207*x^23 - 92013555*x^22 + 49006177*x^21 - 55981054*x^20 - 41883932*x^19 - 22390430*x^18 - 47772190*x^17 - 12596894*x^16 - 12929601*x^15 + 524342*x^14 + 3065628*x^13 + 2628256*x^12 - 1910980*x^11 - 7797090*x^10 - 13105340*x^9 - 16374422*x^8 - 16239672*x^7 - 14122341*x^6 - 9841104*x^5 - 6220905*x^4 - 2947880*x^3 - 1273830*x^2 - 335790*x - 80730)*y^8
	- x^3*(26334*x^35 - 35112*x^34 + 85932*x^33 + 19173*x^32 + 41877*x^31 + 149228*x^30 + 179078*x^29 + 316337*x^28 + 642585*x^27 + 1306656*x^26 + 2673645*x^25 - 1306936*x^24 + 12317879*x^23 - 15950758*x^22 + 20996352*x^21 - 24719850*x^20 + 7821738*x^19 - 14920610*x^18 - 6881066*x^17 - 5618864*x^16 - 5391296*x^15 - 1735712*x^14 - 1181480*x^13 - 477878*x^12 - 782888*x^11 - 1319288*x^10 - 1888388*x^9 - 2240747*x^8 - 2261993*x^7 - 1994362*x^6 - 1472011*x^5 - 973015*x^4 - 493050*x^3 - 229230*x^2 - 64350*x - 17550)*y^7
	+ x^3*(7315*x^33 - 5390*x^32 + 16478*x^31 + 13827*x^30 + 17756*x^29 + 38759*x^28 + 63545*x^27 + 106650*x^26 + 188865*x^25 + 339794*x^24 + 606925*x^23 - 558369*x^22 + 2473395*x^21 - 3943773*x^20 + 3479740*x^19 - 5042809*x^18 + 875637*x^17 - 2660428*x^16 - 834072*x^15 - 864786*x^14 - 468388*x^13 - 258775*x^12 - 189986*x^11 - 198601*x^10 - 229568*x^9 - 252664*x^8 - 249801*x^7 - 220343*x^6 - 170771*x^5 - 116724*x^4 - 64215*x^3 - 31647*x^2 - 9711*x - 2925)*y^6
	- x^3*(1540*x^31 - 154*x^30 + 2574*x^29 + 3851*x^28 + 5353*x^27 + 8874*x^26 + 14661*x^25 + 23802*x^24 + 38316*x^23 + 61153*x^22 + 96194*x^21 - 176381*x^20 + 380147*x^19 - 759154*x^18 + 428738*x^17 - 755771*x^16 + 57227*x^15 - 318956*x^14 - 72298*x^13 - 83210*x^12 - 32694*x^11 - 26945*x^10 - 22266*x^9 - 22314*x^8 - 20875*x^7 - 18104*x^6 - 14337*x^5 - 10091*x^4 - 6064*x^3 - 3135*x^2 - 1089*x - 351)*y^5
	+ x^3*(231*x^29 + 132*x^28 + 363*x^27 + 651*x^26 + 1002*x^25 + 1512*x^24 + 2277*x^23 + 3393*x^22 + 4956*x^21 + 7062*x^20 + 9807*x^19 - 39073*x^18 + 43778*x^17 - 108064*x^16 + 37252*x^15 - 77867*x^14 + 1300*x^13 - 23044*x^12 - 3571*x^11 - 3982*x^10 - 1521*x^9 - 1383*x^8 - 1203*x^7 - 996*x^6 - 777*x^5 - 561*x^4 - 363*x^3 - 198*x^2 - 81*x - 27)*y^4
	- x^3*(22*x^27 + 28*x^26 + 44*x^25 + 70*x^24 + 106*x^23 + 152*x^22 + 208*x^21 + 274*x^20 + 350*x^19 + 436*x^18 + 532*x^17 - 5907*x^16 + 3729*x^15 - 10530*x^14 + 2128*x^13 - 4844*x^12 - 22*x^11 - 746*x^10 - 55*x^9 - 45*x^8 - 36*x^7 - 28*x^6 - 21*x^5 - 15*x^4 - 10*x^3 - 6*x^2 - 3*x - 1)*y^3
	+ x^13*(x^15 + 2*x^14 + 3*x^13 + 4*x^12 + 5*x^11 + 6*x^10 + 7*x^9 + 8*x^8 + 9*x^7 + 10*x^6 + 11*x^5 - 583*x^4 + 223*x^3 - 623*x^2 + 63*x - 136)*y^2
	+ x^13*(35*x^2 - 7*x + 17)*y
	- x^13;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
